user.title: Connect to LLM API
user.description: Set up your configurable LLM API connection. Works with Anthropic-compatible APIs including the official API, z.ai, and other compatible services.

data_description.api_key: Enter your API key for the LLM service.
data_description.base_url: Enter the base URL for your LLM API endpoint. Default is Anthropic's official API. Use z.ai or other compatible services by entering their base URL.

init.title: Configure conversation agent
init.description: Configure the conversation agent with basic settings.

data_description.prompt: Set a custom system prompt to define the assistant's behavior and personality.

model.title: Model-specific settings
model.description: Configure settings specific to the selected model.

data_description.thinking_budget: Tokens to allocate for thinking in extended thinking mode.
data_description.thinking_effort: Effort level for extended thinking mode.
data_description.web_search_max_uses: Maximum number of web searches per conversation.
data_description.web_search_user_location: Include user's location in web search queries.

error.thinking_budget_too_large: Thinking budget must be less than max tokens

error.authentication_error: Authentication failed. Please check your API key.
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the API. Please check your base URL and network connection.
error.timeout_connect: Connection timeout. The API took too long to respond.
error.invalid_url_format: Invalid API endpoint format. Check that the base URL is correct and ends with / (e.g., https://api.z.ai/v1/)
error.entry_not_loaded: The integration entry is not loaded. Please reload the integration and try again.
